Computer and Games 2006, University of Turin [1]

Conferences are composed of presentations, usually followed by a discussion. The work may be bundled in written form as academic papers, published as the conference proceedings.

Advances[edit]

Advances in Computer Chess, in 1999 renamed in Advances in Computer Games are conferences organized by the ICCA, in 2002 renamed to the ICGA.
